name: buran
description: OpenClaw plugin skeleton for local execution of approved GitHub task packets.

scripts.check: node -e "import('./index.js')" && git check-ignore -q registry/runs/example/run.json && git check-ignore -q .openclaw-runtime/plugins/buran/registry/runs/example/run.json && node --check index.js && find src bin test -name '*.js' -print0 | xargs -0 -n1 node --check
